items.quote: Can I say that Alex Pereira's chinny?

items.claim: Alex Pereira has been dropped or rocked multiple times in his UFC career.
items.quote: He got rocked by Big Ank at the end of round two. He got rocked by Izzy in the first time that they fought, too, at the end of the first round. He got dropped by [__] jab

items.claim: Marvin Vettori has a better chin than Alex Pereira.
items.quote: Marvin Vettori has a better chin than Alex Pereira.

items.claim: Nazim Sadikhov has poor defensive durability for getting dropped by Camilo.
items.quote: Like why are you getting dropped by Camilo at all?
